name: Computeruse
description: Computer automation plugin for ElizaOS - enables AI agents to control the local machine (when supported) or a remote ComputerUse MCP server

COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED.label: Use Enabled
COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED.help: Enable computer use capabilities (desktop automation, screenshots, browser control)

COMPUTER_USE_SCREENSHOT_AFTER_ACTION.label: Use Screenshot After Action
COMPUTER_USE_SCREENSHOT_AFTER_ACTION.help: Automatically capture a screenshot after each desktop action

COMPUTER_USE_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS.label: Use Action Timeout Ms
COMPUTER_USE_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS.help: Maximum action execution timeout in milliseconds

COMPUTER_USE_APPROVAL_MODE.label: Use Approval Mode
COMPUTER_USE_APPROVAL_MODE.help: Approval mode for computer-use commands: full_control auto-approves everything, smart_approve auto-approves safe read-only commands, approve_all requires approval for every command, off denies all commands.

COMPUTER_USE_BROWSER_HEADLESS.label: Use Browser Headless
COMPUTER_USE_BROWSER_HEADLESS.help: Run browser automation headlessly. Useful for CI and test environments without a visible desktop session.
